summary: Filtered retag updates to canonical editable transaction rows and excluded unconverted foreign balances from net-worth totals.
reason: Bulk transaction updates should not target split parents or group children, and aggregate net-worth totals must not add raw non-base-currency balances when no to_base conversion is available.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes, including retag split/group filtering and unconverted foreign-balance net-worth coverage.
